Package io.github.igorgf.control

package io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.

This package provides sum types (algebraic data types) for representing optional values, disjoint results, and validation outcomes in a null safe, functional style:

  • Option - presence or absence of a value
  • Either - a disjoint union of two possible outcomes
  • Validation - a validated value or an accumulated list of errors
  • Try - a computation that may throw, with exception handling

Null policy: All methods in this package reject null arguments by throwing NullPointerException. This is a precondition violation (a bug in the caller), not a domain result, and is therefore not represented in the return type. The functional types in this package are null safe by construction, once a value is wrapped in the above listed types it is guaranteed non-null.

Exception policy: Checked exceptions are used only for precondition violations (e.g. Validation.invalid(List.of()) throws EmptyValueException).

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Igor Flakiewicz
  • Class
    Description
    Either<L,R>
    A disjoint union (sum type) representing exactly one of two possible outcomes: Left<L> or Right<R>.
    Empty<T>
    The value absence representing implementation of Option.
    EmptyValueException
     
    Invalid<E,T>
     
    Left<L,R>
    The left L value implementation of Either<L, R>.
    Option<T>
    A sum type representing the presence or absence of a value, as a null-safe alternative to Optional.
    Present<T>
    The value presence representing implementation of Option.
    Right<L,R>
    The right R value implementation of Either<L, R>.
    Thrown
     
    Try<R>
     
    Try.TryBiFunctionStep<T,U,R>
     
    Try.TryFunctionStep<T,R>
     
    TryBiFunction<T,U,R>
     
    TryBiFunctionWithResources<T extends AutoCloseable, U extends AutoCloseable, R>
     
    TryFunction<T,R>
     
    TryFunctionWithResource<T extends AutoCloseable, R>
     
    TryWithResources<R>
     
    TryWithResources.TryBiFunctionWithResourcesStep<T extends AutoCloseable, U extends AutoCloseable, R>
     
    TryWithResources.TryFunctionWithResourceStep<T extends AutoCloseable, R>
     
    Valid<E,T>
     
    Validation<E,T>
    A disjoint union (sum type) representing a validated value Valid<T> or an accumulated List<E> of errors contained by Invalid<E>.
    ValidationBuilder<E>
     
    WithFinally<R>
